name: Live-event ticket service / convenience fee
summary: Mandatory service, convenience, or processing fees on live-event ticket purchases.

evidence.claim: FTC Junk Fees Rule (effective May 12, 2025) requires all mandatory fees on live-event tickets to be included in the advertised Total Price.

body.canonicalName: Service / convenience / processing fee on ticket purchase
body.description: Mandatory fees (service fee, convenience fee, processing fee, facility fee, order processing fee) added by ticket sellers at or near checkout. Explicitly covered by the FTC Junk Fees Rule's live-event-tickets scope (E1); must now be in the advertised Total Price.

disclosureLegality.requirement: Must be included in advertised Total Price since May 12, 2025 (E1).
